name: Abyssal Assimilation
description: Grants a variety of effects when embedded in an equipment socket. Witches found in each region have the power to embed or remove Abyss gears.

name: Abyssal Rays
description: Grants a variety of effects when embedded in an equipment socket. Witches found in each region have the power to embed or remove Abyss gears.  Abyssal Rays: Draws power from the Abyss to shoot damaging rays of light.
